backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex ICP/ckUSDT grid trading bot with configurable interval, spread, and order count, plus start/stop control via recurring timers and query endpoints for status and grid state.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the trading bot UI.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, card, border, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app at #root and loads the Vite module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the sticky header, footer, and a responsive dashboard layout containing BotControlPanel, ConfigurationPanel, MarketDataPanel, and GridPreviewTable.
React panel component displaying bot running/stopped status with animated indicator and Start/Stop buttons that call the corresponding backend mutations with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: React form panel for editing intervalSeconds, spreadBps, and numOrders with client-side validation, syncing from the backend config query, and saving via the setConfig mutation.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays a sortable table of the bot's current grid orders (buys and sells) fetched via `useLastGrid`, with loading skeletons, order count badges, and a manual refresh button.
Shows the latest mid price for the ICP/ckUSDT pair fetched via `useLastMidPrice`, along with pair/exchange metadata, loading state, and a refresh button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) via `@dfinity/auth-client`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for reading bot status, config, mid price, and grid data, as well as mutations for starting/stopping the bot and updating config, all polling every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports JetBrains Mono, sets up a terminal-dark OKLCH color theme with CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, and defines utility classes for buy/sell colors and terminal-style borders.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the trading terminal frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, sidebar, terminal buy/sell/neutral), JetBrains Mono/Inter fonts, terminal-specific box shadows, and animation keyframes. Enables dark mode via class, typography, container-queries, and tailwindcss-animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 9) describing a Motoko-based ICP/ckUSDT grid trading bot canister on ICDex, tracking architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features including the React dashboard frontend with terminal theme, balances panel, and bot controls.
